title: Infinite Scroll

statement.markdown:
### Problem Statement
We want users to be able to browse through a large list of items without having to navigate to multiple pages. This can be achieved using an infinite scroll feature.

## Solution
Your task is to implement an infinite scroll feature for a list of items.

### Requirements
1. The list of items should be generated dynamically.
2. The infinite scroll feature should be triggered when the user reaches the bottom of the list.
3. The list should be paginated (i.e., divided into chunks).
4. Each chunk should be loaded when the user scrolls to the bottom of the previous chunk.

constraints: The list of items must be generated dynamically.
The infinite scroll feature should be triggered when the user reaches the bottom of the list.
The list should be paginated (i.e., divided into chunks).
